## One code, two client slots

- A new six-digit code can be used once by a web browser and once by another Android phone, in either order.
- The phone remembers each slot separately across reconnects and restarts.
- Reusing the same code for a second browser or a second Android phone is rejected.
- Existing paired devices keep their saved access token after the six-digit code closes.

This release keeps the v0.3.6 one-time reset migration active for users who skipped directly from an older version.
